description:
The Redmond DMV provides essential driver and vehicle services for Central Oregon residents. Whether you need to renew your driver’s license, register a vehicle, transfer a title, or take a driving test, this location offers the core services required to stay compliant on the road.

Appointments are recommended for many services, and wait times can vary depending on the day and time. Be sure to check current requirements and bring all necessary documents before your visit to avoid delays.

Conveniently located in Redmond, this DMV serves as a key resource for both new residents and long-time locals handling vehicle and licensing needs.
title: DMV - Redmond

title: Pacific Power

description:
A member-owned, not-for-profit electric cooperative, Central Electric Cooperative (CEC) has provided electric utility services to its members in central Oregon since 1941. CEC provides electric service to portions of Deschutes, Crook, Jefferson, Grant, Linn, Wasco, and Lake counties in central and eastern Oregon.

CEC is one of Oregon’s 18 member-owned cooperative electric utilities. CEC is a transmission and distribution cooperative. Its source of wholesale electricity is the federal power marketing agency, the Bonneville Power Administration. CEC obtains this supply through Portland, Oregon based PNGC Power, a generation and transmission cooperative owned by 14 Northwest electric distribution cooperative utilities, including CEC.

Phone Numbers:
24-Hour Business Calls: (541) 548-2144
Toll Free: (800) 924-8736
Report a Power Outage: (541) 548-2144
Alternate Outage Reporting: (866) 459-8651
title: Central Electric Cooperative

description: At BrightSide, we believe every animal deserves a second chance at happiness. Our shelter is dedicated to providing essential services focused on sheltering and rehabilitating animals, ensuring each one receives the care and support they need for a loving forever home. As their voice, we advocate for those who cannot speak for themselves, giving them the opportunity to live happy, fulfilling lives. Join us in our life-saving mission to give these deserving pets the second chance they truly deserve.
title: Brightside Animal Shelter

description: Since 1942, Redmond Veterinary Clinic has been providing compassionate, high-quality veterinary care to pets throughout Central Oregon. With a legacy built on experience, education, and uncompromising care, the clinic offers advanced medical and surgical services while fostering lasting relationships with pets and their families. As a Fear Free™ and Cat Friendly Practice, their team is committed to creating a low-stress, welcoming environment where every pet receives the comfort, respect, and expert care they deserve.
title: Redmond Veterinary Clinic Central Oregon

address: Les Schwab Tires, Downtown Redmond, OR
description:
Be a part of Downtown Redmond's Flag Project! Volunteers put out and take down American flags on national holidays throughout the year. We meet at Les Schwab Tires and could really use help from anyone when we put out and take up the flags.

Holidays: Memorial Day, Flag Day (June 14), Independence Day (July 4), Labor Day, Patriot Day (Sept 11), Veterans Day (Nov 11).

Volunteer times: 5:45 AM to put out flags, 5:45 PM to take them down.

Contact: Jeff Casserly | jeff@ycob.net | 541-550-6656
title: Flag City USA – Redmond Flag Project
